unexpected_finds.title: Costin slot 06 file is the entire book, not just chapter 5
unexpected_finds.detail: 06_costin_2008_chap5.pdf in tex/submitted/control center/literature/g3b_2026-05-03/ is 1402505 bytes / 258 pages, with full ToC including chapters 1-5 + appendix; the filename 'chap5' is misleading. SHA256 prefix matches SHA256SUMS.txt entry (436c6c11). Recommend rename to 06_costin_2008_full.pdf in a future literature-hygiene pass; not a blocker for this task.
